root_text.iti106:2.1: “Sabrahmakāni, bhikkhave, tāni kulāni yesaṁ puttānaṁ mātāpitaro ajjhāgāre pūjitā honti.
root_text.iti106:2.2: Sapubbadevatāni, bhikkhave, tāni kulāni yesaṁ puttānaṁ mātāpitaro ajjhāgāre pūjitā honti.
root_text.iti106:2.3: Sapubbācariyakāni, bhikkhave, tāni kulāni yesaṁ puttānaṁ mātāpitaro ajjhāgāre pūjitā honti.
root_text.iti106:2.4: Sāhuneyyakāni, bhikkhave, tāni kulāni yesaṁ puttānaṁ mātāpitaro ajjhāgāre pūjitā honti.
root_text.iti106:3.6: Bahukārā, bhikkhave, mātāpitaro puttānaṁ āpādakā posakā imassa lokassa dassetāro”ti.
root_text.iti106:7.1: Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.

translation_text.iti106:0.3: The Chapter on the Brahmin’s Offering of the Teaching
translation_text.iti106:1.1: This was said by the Buddha, the Perfected One: that is what I heard.
translation_text.iti106:2.1: “Mendicants, a family where the children honor their parents in their home is said to live with Divinity.
translation_text.iti106:2.2: A family where the children honor their parents in their home is said to live with the elder gods.
translation_text.iti106:2.3: A family where the children honor their parents in their home is said to live with the first tutors.
translation_text.iti106:2.4: A family where the children honor their parents in their home is said to live with those worthy of offerings dedicated to the gods.
translation_text.iti106:3.1: ‘Divinity’ is a term for your parents.
translation_text.iti106:3.2: ‘Elder gods’ is a term for your parents.
translation_text.iti106:3.3: ‘First tutors’ is a term for your parents.
translation_text.iti106:3.4: ‘Worthy of offerings dedicated to the gods’ is a term for your parents.
translation_text.iti106:3.6: Parents are very helpful to their children, they raise them, nurture them, and show them the world.”
translation_text.iti106:4.3: They’re worthy of offerings dedicated to the gods <j>from their children,
translation_text.iti106:5.2: would revere them and honor them
translation_text.iti106:6.3: they’re praised in this life by the astute,
translation_text.iti106:6.4: and they depart to rejoice in heaven.”
translation_text.iti106:7.1: This too is a matter that was spoken by the Blessed One: that is what I heard.
